General.Name: Smit Holdings Ltd
General.Description: SMIT Holdings Limited designs, develops, and markets security devices primarily for pay TV broadcasting access worldwide. It operates through four segments: CAM, Intelligent sense, Rapid Verification Systems and Software, and IC Solutions. The company develops and sells conditional access modules (CAM) that enable secure distribution and delivery of digital content to television; and rapid hardware-based verification systems and software. It also develops and sells smart sensing-oriented products and solutions; and offers IC products and related design services, including cloud platform and supporting services. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: China Resources Building, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
